channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cr Great Russell St and Bury Place, 3rd April
item.description:
Cover has fallen off street light.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Gilbert Place, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac missing, 3rd April
item.description:
Tarmac missing on pavement on Elmstead Avenue (close to junction with Walden Avenue)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christmas tree still in situ, 3rd April
item.description:
A Christmas tree dropped off at the Broad Walk entrance to Grovelands Park is still there, months after the festive period. Please can someone pick it up.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on electricity sub-station on Community Path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Path, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike shed, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on bike shed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leconfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on pillar close to bus shelter (outside Sainsbury's store) on Chislehurst High Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caller advising the lamp post is bending unusually, 3rd April
item.description:
Caller advising a street lamp is leaning. In her opinion the lamppost is quite bent. Lamppost Location - Copers Cope Road junction with Worsley Bridge Road. Caller Does not have a postcode or a what three words - Closest address details are 193 Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, BR3 1RW, England, United Kingdom // Lampost Marker W3125
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on lamppost 40G10 on on Gosshill Road (close to pumping station)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gosshill Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on bollard on Gosshill Road (close to pumping station)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gosshill Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle in same parking spot for three years hasn’t moved, 3rd April
item.description:
This van has been sat here for 3 years, taking up parking space causing cars to block the way in front of it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keyworth Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on electricity cabinet (several tags on front and side) on Gosshill Road (near Chatham House)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 78 halcot Avenue, 3rd April
item.description:
Light not working making extremly dark in close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halcot Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumping in woodland next to chestnut house and Footpath, 3rd April
item.description:
Illegal dumping needs clearing and monitoring in woodland off watery lane between Chestnut House retirement home and footpath next to horses.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watery Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 160-164 Royal college st, 3rd April
item.description:
2 gas meter cabinets missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Randolph Street, Kentish Town, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on side of pharmacy, 3rd April
item.description:
Tag down the window in Kenbury Street. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Hamster cage, 3rd April
item.description:
Hamster cage been dumped with hamster inside passed away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arran Road, Catford South, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Car, 3rd April
item.description:
No Tax & MOT has had a few tickets and not moved over a month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chatsworth Avenue, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped Wood, 3rd April
item.description:
Flytipped pieces of wood,flytipped over 2 weeks ago. Location is towards end of Canbury Path,opposite the first house on Canbury Path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Canbury Path, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Already new potholes since previous repaiy, 3rd April
item.description:
Already a new potholes showing in the road at the junction on Worsley Bridge Road in Copers Cope
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greycot Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Contractors fly tipping their material waste in the Hotel Car Park, 3rd April
item.description:
For 2 weeks a roofing company has been fly tipping their waste materials into the car park of the hotel. They just dump their materials there and the hotel is forced to have it removed which costs money. The last incident was 6th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackwall Lane, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
